component.description: Advanced Spatial Shape Strategies for Apache Lucene

component.description: Apache HttpComponents HttpClient - MIME coded entities

component.description: Mustache scripting integration for Elasticsearch

component.description: Lucene Queries Module

component.name: httpasyncclient
component.description: Apache HttpComponents AsyncClient

component.name: log4j-over-slf4j
component.description: Log4j implemented over SLF4J

component.name: httpclient
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Client

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: mybatis
component.description: The MyBatis SQL mapper framework makes it easier to use a relational database with object-oriented applications. MyBatis couples objects with stored procedures or SQL statements using a XML descriptor or annotations. Simplicity is the biggest advantage of the MyBatis data mapper over object relational mapping tools.

component.name: jsoup
component.description: jsoup is a Java library for working with real-world HTML. It provides a very convenient API for extracting and manipulating data, using the best of DOM, CSS, and jquery-like methods. jsoup implements the WHATWG HTML5 specification, and parses HTML to the same DOM as modern browsers do.

component.name: commons-dbcp2
component.description: Apache Commons DBCP software implements Database Connection Pooling

component.name: okio
component.description: A modern I/O API for Java

component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: junit-jupiter-api
component.description: Module "junit-jupiter-api" of JUnit 5.

component.name: jackson-dataformat-smile
component.description: Support for reading and writing Smile ("binary JSON") encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: commons-lang
component.description: Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: jna-platform
component.description: Java Native Access Platform

component.name: hazelcast
component.description: Core Hazelcast Module

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: lucene-sandbox
component.description: Lucene Sandbox

component.name: protobuf-java
component.description: Core Protocol Buffers library. Protocol Buffers are a way of encoding structured data in an efficient yet extensible format.

component.name: velocity
component.description: Apache Velocity is a general purpose template engine.

component.name: assertj-core
component.description: Rich and fluent assertions for testing for Java

component.name: opentest4j
component.description: Open Test Alliance for the JVM

component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :client:rest-high-level

component.name: lucene-suggest
component.description: Lucene Suggest Module

component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.description: Lucene QueryParsers module

component.name: parent-join-client
component.description: This module adds the support parent-child queries and aggregations

component.name: apiguardian-api
component.description: @API Guardian

component.name: json-simple
component.description: A simple Java toolkit for JSON

component.name: elasticsearch
component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :server

component.name: tomcat-annotations-api
component.description: Annotations Package

component.name: jul-to-slf4j
component.description: JUL to SLF4J bridge

component.name: lucene-grouping
component.description: Lucene Grouping Module

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: staxmate
component.description: StaxMate is a light-weight framework that adds convenience to streaming XML-processing without significant additional overhead. It builds on top of a Stax (JSR-173) compliant XML processors such as Woodstox or Sjsxp (default Stax implementation of JDK 1.6) and offers two basic abstractions: Cursors, which build on XMLStreamReaders and Output objects, which build on XMLStreamWriters.

component.name: hppc
component.description: High Performance Primitive Collections. Fundamental data structures (maps, sets, lists, stacks, queues) generated for combinations of object and primitive types to conserve JVM memory and speed up execution.

component.name: org.jacoco.agent
component.description: JaCoCo Agent

component.name: lz4-java
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: woodstox-core
component.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

component.name: failureaccess
component.description: Contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its classes is conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the listenablefuture artifact).

component.name: aggs-matrix-stats-client
component.description: Adds aggregations whose input are a list of numeric fields and output includes a matrix.

component.name: org.eclipse.jgit
component.description: Repository access and algorithms

component.name: antlr-runtime
component.description: A framework for constructing recognizers, compilers, and translators from grammatical descriptions containing Java, C#, C++, or Python actions.

component.name: xmlsec
component.description: Apache XML Security for Java supports XML-Signature Syntax and Processing, W3C Recommendation 12 February 2002, and XML Encryption Syntax and Processing, W3C Recommendation 10 December 2002. As of version 1.4, the library supports the standard Java API JSR-105: XML Digital Signature APIs.

component.name: sqljet
component.description: Java(tm) library to manage sqlite databases

component.name: junit-platform-commons
component.description: Module "junit-platform-commons" of JUnit 5.

component.name: commons-csv
component.description: The Apache Commons CSV library provides a simple interface for reading and writing CSV files of various types.

component.name: kotlin-stdlib
component.description: Kotlin Standard Library for JVM

component.name: httpcore
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (blocking I/O)

component.description: logback-classic module

component.name: lucene-memory
component.description: High-performance single-document index to compare against Query

component.name: jackson-dataformat-yaml
component.description: Support for reading and writing YAML-encoded data via Jackson abstractions.

component.name: jsr305
component.description: JSR305 Annotations for Findbugs

component.name: joda-time
component.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

component.name: svnkit
component.description: Java(tm) library to manage Subversion working copies and repositories

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The Apache Log4j API

component.name: mapper-extras-client
component.description: Adds advanced field mappers

component.description: Codecs for older versions of Lucene.

component.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (non-blocking I/O)

component.name: t-digest
component.description: Data structure which allows accurate estimation of quantiles and related rank statistics

component.name: platform
component.description: Java Native Access Platform

component.name: elasticsearch-core
component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :libs:elasticsearch-core

component.name: junit
component.description: JUnit is a unit testing framework for Java, created by Erich Gamma and Kent Beck.

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The Apache Commons Codec package contains simple encoder and decoders for various formats such as Base64 and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: commons-email
component.description: Apache Commons Email aims to provide an API for sending email. It is built on top of the JavaMail API, which it aims to simplify.

component.name: HdrHistogram
component.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

component.name: jopt-simple
component.description: A Java library for parsing command line options

component.name: lucene-core
component.description: Apache Lucene Java Core

component.name: sonar-channel
component.description: Code Channel

component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :libs:elasticsearch-secure-sm

component.name: minimal-json
component.description: A Minimal JSON Parser and Writer

component.name: elasticsearch-x-content
component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :libs:elasticsearch-x-content

component.name: elasticsearch-cli
component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :libs:elasticsearch-cli

component.description: Elasticsearch subproject :client:rest

component.name: logback-access
component.description: logback-access module

component.name: jbcrypt
component.description: OpenBSD-style Blowfish password hashing for Java

component.name: annotations
component.description: A set of annotations used for code inspection support and code documentation.

component.name: kotlin-stdlib-common
component.description: Kotlin Common Standard Library

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: joda-time
component.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

component.name: guava
component.description: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, google's collections, io classes, and much much more.

component.name: log4j-to-slf4j
component.description: The Apache Log4j binding between Log4j 2 API and SLF4J.

component.name: lucene-misc
component.description: Miscellaneous Lucene extensions

component.name: lz4
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: tomcat-embed-core
component.description: Core Tomcat implementation

component.name: lucene-spatial3d
component.description: Lucene Spatial shapes implemented using 3D planar geometry

component.name: rank-eval-client
component.description: The Rank Eval module adds APIs to evaluate ranking quality.

component.name: commons-pool2
component.description: The Apache Commons Object Pooling Library.

component.name: compiler
component.description: Implementation of mustache.js for Java

component.name: JavaEWAH
component.description: The bit array data structure is implemented in Java as the BitSet class. Unfortunately, this fails to scale without compression. JavaEWAH is a word-aligned compressed variant of the Java bitset class. It uses a 64-bit run-length encoding (RLE) compression scheme. The goal of word-aligned compression is not to achieve the best compression, but rather to improve query processing time. Hence, we try to save CPU cycles, maybe at the expense of storage. However, the EWAH scheme we implemented is always more efficient storage-wise than an uncompressed bitmap (implemented in Java as the BitSet class). Unlike some alternatives, javaewah does not rely on a patented scheme.

component.name: sonar-classloader
component.description: Java classloader toolbox

component.name: logback-core
component.description: logback-core module

component.name: javax.annotation-api
component.description: Common Annotations for the JavaTM Platform API

component.name: okhttp
component.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for Java and Kotlin.

component.name: woodstox-core-lgpl
component.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173) and SAX2 APIs

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL), Version 2.1

component.name: activation
component.description: JavaBeans Activation Framework (JAF) is a standard extension to the Java platform that lets you take advantage of standard services to: determine the type of an arbitrary piece of data; encapsulate access to it; discover the operations available on it; and instantiate the appropriate bean to perform the operation(s).

component.name: lucene-highlighter
component.description: This is the highlighter for apache lucene java

component.name: lucene-analyzers-common
component.description: Additional Analyzers

component.name: core
component.description: High performance collections for Java

component.name: diffutils
component.description: The DiffUtils library for computing diffs, applying patches, generationg side-by-side view in Java

component.name: jna
component.description: A build of jna which supports all platforms supported by Elasticsearch

component.name: httpcore
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (blocking I/O)

component.name: trilead-ssh2
component.description: Pure Java SSH-2 Library

component.name: sequence-library
component.description: Textual Diff and Merge Library

component.name: jackson-dataformat-cbor
component.description: Support for reading and writing Concise Binary Object Representation ([CBOR](https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc7049) encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: h2
component.description: H2 Database Engine

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: commons-exec
component.description: Apache Commons Exec is a library to reliably execute external processes from within the JVM.

component.name: jna
component.description: Java Native Access

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.name: jcl-over-slf4j
component.description: JCL 1.2 implemented over SLF4J

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

component.name: hamcrest-core
component.description: This is the core API of hamcrest matcher framework to be used by third-party framework providers. This includes the a foundation set of matcher implementations for common operations.

component.name: stax2-api
component.description: tax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.
